CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2025 Continued To Nov-19-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Petition And Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Mar-18-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT BARCCI BUILDERS, INC.'s Petition To Compel Arbitration.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed petition to compel arbitration is granted. Moving party Barcci Builders, Inc. presents prima facie evidence of a written agreement to arbitrate "any controversy or claim arising out of or related to this contract." The arbitration agreement is also attached as an exhibit to the complaint. The complaint is related to the contract. Plaintiff has not opposed the motion.

Moving party also seeks a stay of the litigation pursuant to CCP 1281.4. A stay is available as of right where the court has compelled arbitration. This matter is stayed until arbitration is concluded.

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
